sections.offgrid:
Based on current news sources, the following items meet the criteria for real, recent off-grid and alternative housing news in northern New Mexico:

**NM Solar Incentives or Legislation 2025–2026**

• 
State solar tax credit increase proposed for 2026 NM Legislature, moving from 10% to 30% with cap increasing from $6,000 to $15,000
. https://350newmexico.org/solar-and-battery-storage/

• 
Federal residential solar tax credit cancelled by presidential action signed July 4, 2025, effective January 1, 2026
. https://solarsme.com/solarsme-new-mexico/

**Alternative Housing: Earthships**

• 
Documentary released November 15, 2025, featuring Earthship community founder Michael Reynolds and off-grid Earthship residents near Taos
. https://www.resilience.org/stories/2026-03-27/inside-the-off-grid-earthship-community-in-new-mexico-youtube-film-review/

**No current news found** on: Taos County zoning changes, NM CID updates on modular/kit homes, Taos-area off-grid community events, or NM water rights/well drilling updates specific to northern New Mexico housing.
sections.land:
Search results show limited specific listings matching all criteria at once (2+ acres, under $60,000). Data aggregation platforms contain mostly properties above the $60,000 threshold or below 2 acres, with many aged catalog entries. Below are verified current listings found:

## Confirmed Listings Meeting Criteria

**Arroyo Hondo:**
- 
$39,000 | 2.49 acres | Mesa Sea Road, Arroyo Hondo | Water: Not available | Road: County Road (gravel) | Source: LandSearch/Land.com | https://www.landsearch.com/properties/mesa-sea-rd-arroyo-hondo-nm-87513/3112562

- 
$68,900 | 2.49 acres | Between 265-277 Mesa Sea, Arroyo Hondo | Water: Not available | Road: County Road | Source: LandSearch | https://www.landsearch.com/properties/between-265-277-mesa-sea-arroyo-hondo-nm-87513/4681944

**Taos County (unspecified target area):**
- 
$59,000 | 2.49 acres | Mesa Sea Road, Arroyo Hondo | Water: Unknown | Road: Unknown | Source: Zillow

## Market Overview

LandWatch has 516 land listings for sale in Taos County, NM
, but 
on average, land listings in Taos County, NM have a lot size of 80 acres and are priced around $826,152
. 

LandWatch has 61 land listings for sale in Taos County, NM under $49,999
—however, most sub-$60K parcels are significantly under 2 acres (typically 0.25-0.5 acre plots in Tres Piedras Estates and Carson Estates subdivisions marketed for off-grid living).

## Trending Observations

- **Off-grid subdivisions active**: 
Tres Piedras Estates is an undeveloped subdivision just outside of the small rural community of Tres Piedras in Taos County. Every property has platted street access, none are landlocked.

- **Financing available**: Multiple small-parcel listings advertise owner financing with minimal down payments ($25-$100), suggesting developer-marketed inventory targeting cash-strapped buyers
- **Scarcity of 2+ acre parcels under $60K**: Most "bargain" listings meet acreage needs with price thresholds, not both simultaneously

Comprehensive site-by-site search of Realtor.com yielded no specific current listings; platform filters limited granular property-level data retrieval in search results.
sections.builders:
## ZOOK CABINS

**Pricing**

Base pricing starts around $132,500 for the Rockwood model
 (2025-2026). 
Delivery costs are included in quoted prices, with Zook Cabins including delivery and setup in their all-in pricing
. 
Quotes include delivery and building setup on foundation; Zook Cabins recommends adding approximately 10% for unforeseen costs
. No specific 2025-2026 price increases documented.

**Models**
- 
Rivara ADU: 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom modern cabin suitable for ADU use

- 
Grove Cabin: Suitable for weekend getaways or ADU use

- Heritage model (referenced but limited current details found)

**Customer Reviews**

Overwhelmingly positive reviews detailing high-quality craftsmanship, stress-free project management, and skilled staff
. 
Customers report swift delivery and customization satisfaction
. 
4.8-star rating with 592 reviews on Birdeye
. Negative reviews cite delivery delays and communication breakdowns on specific projects.

**New Mexico Delivery**

Zook Cabins offers an extensive range of modern cabins for sale in New Mexico
. 
Zook Cabins delivers modular log and modern cabins throughout the United States except Alaska and Hawaii
. 
Park models are RVIA-certified and built to ANSI A119.5 standards for New Mexico's high-altitude conditions; available from Taos to Silver City
.

**Notable Issues for High-Altitude 7000ft Build**

Park models engineered to handle New Mexico's weather extremes including snow in higher elevations and ANSI A119.5 standards certification
. However, these are RV-class structures; permanent foundation homes may require separate consideration.

## MIGHTY SMALL HOMES

**Pricing**

Estimated cost $140-$328+ per square foot, all-inclusive of kit, labor, and site work
 (2021 data; 2025-2026 pricing not updated in search results). 
Freight approximately $4 per mile with $1,200 minimum charge from Louisville, Kentucky
.

**Models**
- 
Modern 600 sq ft

- 
Cottage 600 sq ft

- 
Ranch 768 sq ft

- 
A-Frame 528 sq ft

**Customer Reviews**
Limited recent reviews in search results. 
Mighty Small Homes does not assemble kits themselves; buyers work with local contractors or self-build with basic carpentry skills
. Company targets DIY-capable builders.

**Delivery to New Mexico**

Shipping calculated at $4/mile minimum $1,200 from Louisville, KY
. To Taos County (~1,400 miles): approximately $5,600 freight. No specific NM delivery network identified. No regional limitations stated.

**Key Limitation**
